texto: The arrow belongs not to the archer when it has once left the bow
autor: the word no longer belongs to the speaker when it has once passed his lips.
explicacao: Citação de the word no longer belongs to the speaker when it has once passed his lips. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The arrow belongs not to the archer when it has once left the bow” articula reflexao, heinrich-heine, arrow em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
